parameters.functionCode:
return items.map((item) => {
  const email = item.json || {};
  const classification = email.classify_and_draft || {
    status: 'mock_classification_fallback',
    department_id: 'academic_affairs',
    department_name: '\uD559\uC0AC\uD300',
    department_email: 'academic-affairs@university.ac.kr',
    confidence: 0,
    reason: 'use_mock=true 데모 fallback 경로입니다. use_mock=false 경로에서는 Step 11-6 Solar LLM Classification output 분기로 이동합니다.',
    is_faq: false,
    auto_reply: false,
    auto_reply_allowed: false,
    route_to_department: true,
    core_action: 'route_to_department',
    manual_review: false,
    draft_reply: '',
    routing_summary: 'Mock fallback output only. Actual email sending is not implemented.'
  };

  return {
    json: {
      message_id: email.message_id || '',
      from_email: email.from_email || 'unknown_sender',
      subject: email.subject || '',
      body: email.body || '',
      received_at: email.received_at || '',
      received_at_utc: email.received_at_utc || '',
      received_at_kst: email.received_at_kst || '',
      source_mailbox: email.source_mailbox || 'core_credential_mailbox',
      intake_channel: email.intake_channel || 'unknown',
      is_forwarded_to_core: email.is_forwarded_to_core === true,
      virtual_department_emails: email.virtual_department_emails || {},
      attachments: Array.isArray(email.attachments) ? email.attachments : [],
      document_parse_status: email.document_parse_status || '',
      document_text: email.document_text || '',
      document_summary: email.document_summary || '',
      parsed_attachments: Array.isArray(email.parsed_attachments) ? email.parsed_attachments : [],
      document_parse_error: email.document_parse_error || '',
      information_extract_status: email.information_extract_status || '',
      extracted_student_info: email.extracted_student_info || {},
      extracted_request_info: email.extracted_request_info || {},
      information_extract_error: email.information_extract_error || '',
      status: classification.status,
      is_faq: classification.is_faq === true,
      department_id: classification.department_id || '',
      department_name: classification.department_name || '',
      department_email: classification.department_email || '',
      confidence: Number.isFinite(Number(classification.confidence)) ? Number(classification.confidence) : 0,
      reason: classification.reason || '',
      auto_reply: classification.auto_reply === true,
      auto_reply_allowed: classification.auto_reply_allowed === true,
      route_to_department: classification.route_to_department === true,
      core_action: classification.core_action || '',
      manual_review: classification.manual_review === true,
      draft_reply: classification.draft_reply || '',
      routing_summary: classification.routing_summary || '',
      delivery_status: classification.delivery_status || 'mock_output_only',
      use_mock: email.use_mock === true,
      no_actual_email_sent: true,
      step: '11-6_solar_classification_mock_fallback'
    },
    binary: item.binary
  };
});

nodes.notes: Routes only department-assigned emails to the selected department address. No Gmail credential id is hardcoded; select the Gmail credential in n8n after import. This node does not implement department-to-student replies.
